label: plain_text
text:
4。
Creative
 Chitti is a different kind of
calculator. It has the following buttons:
pu1 000000+^00001+0001+001+01+1+
+10ooooo. It always has multiple ways of
doing things. “How so?", you might ask.
To get the number 321, it presses
6+10
thirty two times and +1 once. Will it get
321? Alternatively, it can press +100 two
times and +10 twelve times and +1 once.
